testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'LAPTOP-K3G4RAK0', ip: '192.168.1.111'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'LAPTOP-K3G4RAK0', ip: '192.168.1.111'
